title: atriplex vesicaria subsp. incompta
intro: Atriplex vesicaria subsp. incompta, also known as the inland saltbush, is a type of shrub native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Atriplex vesicaria subsp. incompta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or applied topically as a paste or salve, providing relief from various health issues.
